scripts.load: docker run --rm -i -v "$PWD:/scripts" -w /scripts -e K6_STAGE_TARGET=${K6_STAGE_TARGET:-10} -e K6_SLEEP_SEC=${K6_SLEEP_SEC:-1} -e TARGET_URL grafana/k6:latest run load/saucedemo-load.js
scripts.load:ci: K6_STAGE_TARGET=5 K6_SLEEP_SEC=1 docker run --rm -i -v "$PWD:/scripts" -w /scripts -e K6_STAGE_TARGET -e K6_SLEEP_SEC -e TARGET_URL grafana/k6:latest run load/saucedemo-load.js
scripts.load:docker: docker run --rm -i -v "$PWD:/scripts" -w /scripts -e K6_STAGE_TARGET -e K6_SLEEP_SEC -e TARGET_URL grafana/k6:latest run load/saucedemo-load.js
